text: Spleen is an internal organ which is present in our left upper abdomen and its main function is immunological and processing of our blood cells. Sometimes the spleen gets hugely enlarged because of disease condition and causes so many symptoms to the patient and there are certain indications to remove the spleen in disease conditions.

One of them is thalassemia. so we are presenting one case where we had a huge and large spleen in a patient with a twenty years old female having thalassemia needing repeated blood transfusion so the spleen was huge normally spleen will be around nine to ten centimeter but this particular patient had twenty two centimeter long spleen which is reaching halfway between upper abdomen and umbilicus.

So, the question was whether this huge spleen can be removed by minimally invasive surgery or we have to do an open surgery because of the advantage of robotic technology this large spleen could be removed by keyhole surgery using da Vinci XI robotic system and it was a successful surgery patient was discharged on second postoperative day
